steps.eval: (()=>{const tree=document.querySelector('[data-testid=artifact-tree]'); if(!tree) return {err:'no tree'}; const walker=document.createTreeWalker(tree, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT); let n; const matches=[]; while(n=walker.nextNode()){ if((n.textContent||'').trim()==='design-chat-parity-gaps'){ let p=n.parentElement; while(p && p!==tree){ if(p.onclick||p.getAttribute('role')==='button'||p.tagName==='BUTTON'||p.tagName==='A'){ return {found:true, tag:p.tagName, cls:p.className.slice(0,80)}; } p=p.parentElement; } matches.push({tag:n.parentElement.tagName, parentCls:n.parentElement.className.slice(0,100)}); } } return {found:false, matches};})()
